_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study.

_contextSnippet: Xenografts were allowed to establish for 4 weeks in 4 nude mice. Figure 1 shows representative MRI imaging of xenografts 4 weeks after transplantation.
details: Successfully supported vestibular schwannoma xenograft establishment and growth for 4+ weeks, allowing MRI imaging and drug efficacy testing
